benefits.description: Product was making them eat less

protocol_notes: OP was sourcing a product labeled 'Retratide' from a brother-in-law and became skeptical of its authenticity due to the misspelled label. Noticed it stopped working as well and was considering upping the dose. Switched to a new vendor selling Retatrutide. Asking community advice on whether to restart at a lower dose or continue at same dose when switching vendors/vials.
